summary: Added a new skill providing UI/UX design intelligence with 50+ styles, 97 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 9 technology stacks. Includes rule categories by priority (accessibility, touch/interaction, performance, layout/responsive, typography/color, animation, style selection, charts/data), quick reference guides for accessibility, touch targets, performance optimization, layout/responsive design, typography/color, animation, style selection, and charts/data. Provides workflow for analyzing user requirements, generating design systems, supplementing with detailed searches, and applying stack-specific guidelines. Includes extensive data files for charts, colors, icons, landing patterns, products, prompts, and technology stacks (html-tailwind, react, nextjs, vue, svelte, swiftui, react-native, flutter, shadcn).
